description_long: This object is a rectangular, industrial-style device with a predominantly black body and metallic side panels. The top surface features a bold yellow and black striped pattern, reminiscent of caution markings, and a prominent black handle extends from one end. One side displays a metallic panel with a small yellow accent, while the opposite side has two cylindrical red elements and a circular port. The front and rear panels are metallic, with the front showing multiple ports and switches, and the rear having a more solid, angular design. The overall construction suggests a rugged, utilitarian device, possibly designed for field or urban deployment.
description: A rugged, black and metallic device with yellow caution stripes, a handle, and visible ports and red cylindrical elements on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing a metallic panel with a yellow accent and the black handle extending from the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting multiple ports and switches on a metallic panel, with the handle visible on top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring two red cylindrical elements and a circular port on a metallic panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid, angular black end with the yellow-striped top and handle visible.
attribute_port_arrangement: Multiple ports and switches on the front metallic panel, circular port and two cylindrical elements on one side
